title: Seedfall
genericDescription: Use randomization responsibly; constrain probability; support replayability without unfairness.
specificDescription: A seeded procedural orchard run. Hazards, fruit, wind lanes, and exit placement are generated from a replay code with fairness constraints.
gradingRubric: 30 pts procedural logic; 20 pts fairness constraints; 20 pts replayability; 15 pts seed/reproduction support; 15 pts notes.
